description: Reviewer must categorise a hardcoded live API key as security/blocker (not soften it to a quality nit) AND separately flag a genuine minor naming nit. Probes category + severity accuracy.
source: real_failure: a hardcoded API key was found in review but mis-categorised as 'quality' instead of 'security', so it shipped behind a low-priority label.
prompt: Review this diff for correctness, security and quality issues. Acceptance criteria: add a payments HTTP client factory.
